chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: Do you want to learn programming in a fun way?

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: And that too, the fastest growing language, which is Python.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: So here we are.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: Welcome to Therisk or Learnings. My name is Devon Vade.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: And in this series, you will learn Python language from start to end.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: The only prerequisite here is your time.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: If you have not done programming before, that's completely fine.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: Because in this series, we will start from scratch.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: So you will understand the language fundamentals.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: You will understand the syntax and not just that.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: We will also focus on concepts.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: So this Python series will be fun to learn and

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: So you can learn the entire Python language for free.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: When you are learning something online, you know, you may get bored

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: or you may get distracted by don't worry.

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial

chunks.title: Programming Tutorial
chunks.text: Welcome to the Alien World Everyone.

text: Do you want to learn programming in a fun way? And that too, the fastest growing language, which is Python. So here we are. Welcome to Therisk or Learnings. My name is Devon Vade. And in this series, you will learn Python language from start to end. The only prerequisite here is your time. Nothing else. If you have not done programming before, that's completely fine. Because in this series, we will start from scratch. So you will understand the language fundamentals. You will understand the syntax and not just that. We will also focus on concepts. So this Python series will be fun to learn and that to it is freely available. So you can learn the entire Python language for free. When you are learning something online, you know, you may get bored or you may get distracted by don't worry. In this series, I will try to make this session as much as interesting as possible. Maybe with the help of my presence, maybe with the help of animations and different stuff. So I hope you will enjoy this series. But make sure that you subscribe to the channel before going ahead and also share with your friends, let everyone learn programming. Welcome to the Alien World Everyone.
